legal.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
legal.privacy.updated: Version dated April 9, 2026. We publish changes and update date on this page.
legal.privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Taska.uz collects, uses, stores and protects personal data when you use the website, submit forms, communicate with us via Instagram and Telegram, and interact with our team in other channels.
legal.privacy.s1Body: Taska.uz acts as the data controller for personal data processed through this website and related communication channels. The policy applies to visitors, leads, clients, partners and representatives of legal entities.
legal.privacy.s2Body: We may process: name, phone, e-mail, company and role, message content, project details, communication history, technical data (IP, browser, device), cookies and analytics events, as well as data you provide in files, screenshots or voice messages during communication.
legal.privacy.s3Body: Data is received directly from you through website forms, e-mails, calls and chats, including Instagram Direct and Telegram chats. We may also receive data from your colleagues on your instruction and from lawful public business sources.
legal.privacy.s4Body: We process data to respond to requests, prepare proposals, provide demos, negotiate and execute contracts, onboard and support projects, maintain client communications, ensure security, detect abuse, comply with legal obligations, and improve product and service quality.
legal.privacy.s5Body: Depending on the context, processing is based on your consent, necessity to take pre-contractual steps or perform a contract, our legitimate interest in operating and securing the service, and compliance with legal obligations.
legal.privacy.s6Body: If you contact us via Instagram or Telegram, we can read, store and process correspondence and attached materials to provide consultation, support and service follow-up. Please do not send excessive or sensitive data unless required. Messaging platforms act as independent service providers and process data under their own policies.
legal.privacy.s7Body: We use technical logs and analytics to understand traffic, website performance and conversion quality. We do not use your form data for unlawful profiling or fully automated decisions that create legal effects for you.
legal.privacy.s8Body: We do not sell personal data. Data may be shared with hosting, analytics, CRM, communications and technical support vendors strictly for the purposes above, under confidentiality and data processing obligations.
legal.privacy.s9Body: Some providers (including social and messaging platforms) may process data in other jurisdictions. Where required, we apply reasonable safeguards and contractual controls to protect transferred data.
legal.privacy.s10Body: We store data no longer than needed for the processing purposes, legal compliance and dispute resolution. Lead and communication records may be retained for business continuity and support history, then deleted or anonymized according to internal rules.
legal.privacy.s11Body: You may request access, correction, update, deletion, restriction or objection to processing where applicable, and may withdraw consent for consent-based processing. To do so, contact us using the details in the website footer. We may request verification of identity.
legal.privacy.s12Body: We apply reasonable organizational and technical safeguards against unauthorized access, loss, alteration and disclosure of data. No Internet transmission is absolutely secure, but we continuously improve controls. This policy may be updated; continued use of the website after publication means acceptance of the updated version.
legal.privacy.disclaimer: If you need a specific legal form (for example, for regulated industries, DPA addendum or corporate procurement), request an extended version via contacts.
legal.terms.title: Terms of Use
legal.terms.updated: Version dated April 9, 2026. By using taska.uz, you agree to these Terms.
legal.terms.intro: These Terms regulate access to and use of the Taska.uz website and related communication channels. Project-specific legal and commercial obligations are defined in separate agreements, statements of work, offers and annexes.
legal.terms.s1Body: The Terms apply to all visitors and users of the website. If you continue using the website after publication of an updated version, it is considered acceptance of the updated Terms.
legal.terms.s2Body: Website materials are for informational and communication purposes and do not constitute legal, tax, accounting or other professional advice. Any implementation decision should be based on separate analysis and contractual documents.
legal.terms.s3Body: You agree to provide accurate contact details, not violate applicable law, not attempt unauthorized access, not interfere with website operation, and not use forms/chats for spam, fraud or malicious actions.
legal.terms.s4Body: All website content, brand assets, design elements and materials are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. Reproduction, adaptation, distribution or commercial use is prohibited without prior written permission, except where permitted by law.
legal.terms.s5Body: You may contact us through forms, e-mail, Instagram and Telegram. We may process communication history and attachments for request handling and support. Do not share unnecessary sensitive data in open channels.
legal.terms.s6Body: The website may contain links to third-party services and social platforms. We are not responsible for their content, availability, security practices or data processing policies. Use of third-party resources is at your own risk.
legal.terms.s7Body: The website is provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. To the maximum extent allowed by law, we are not liable for indirect, incidental or consequential losses arising from website use.
legal.terms.s8Body: We may restrict or suspend access where necessary to protect security, perform maintenance, comply with legal obligations, or prevent abuse.
legal.terms.s9Body: Disputes related to website use should first be addressed through good-faith negotiation. If unresolved, applicable law and competent jurisdiction are determined by mandatory legal rules and relevant contract terms (if any).
legal.terms.s10Body: We may update these Terms at any time. The current version date is shown on this page. We recommend reviewing this section periodically.
legal.terms.disclaimer: For enterprise procurement, investor due diligence and partner integrations, additional legal documents (including NDA, DPA and custom annexes) can be provided upon request.
legal.cookies.title: Cookie Policy
legal.cookies.updated: Version dated April 9, 2026. This section explains what cookies we use and how you can manage them.
legal.cookies.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when visiting a website. We use cookies and similar technologies for core functionality, language preferences, analytics and service quality improvements.
legal.cookies.s1Title: 1) What are cookies and similar technologies
legal.cookies.s1Body: Cookies can be session-based (deleted when browser closes) or persistent (stored for a defined period). Similar technologies may include local storage, tags and analytics identifiers.
legal.cookies.s2Title: 2) Categories of cookies we may use
legal.cookies.s2Body: a) Strictly necessary cookies for website operation; b) preference cookies (e.g., language); c) analytics/performance cookies; d) security-related technical identifiers.
legal.cookies.s3Body: Cookies help keep sessions stable, remember settings, measure traffic and conversion trends, detect issues and improve usability across devices and browser versions.
legal.cookies.s4Body: Some cookies may be set by third-party services (for example, analytics or social platform widgets). Those providers process data under their own privacy and cookie policies.
legal.cookies.s5Body: Cookie lifetime depends on purpose: session cookies expire when you close the browser; persistent cookies remain until their configured expiry or until manually deleted.
legal.cookies.s6Body: You can block or delete cookies in browser settings and use add-ons/privacy tools. Disabling certain cookies may affect functionality, page speed, localization and embedded features.
legal.cookies.s7Body: Where required by law, non-essential cookies are used on the basis of consent. Essential technical cookies may be used based on legitimate interest in secure and proper website operation.
legal.cookies.s8Body: We may update this Cookie Policy to reflect legal, technical or operational changes. The current version date is always shown on this page.
